parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { model: $json.anthropicModel, max_tokens: 5000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.orchestratorPrompt + '

Selected reason: ' + $json.selectedTopicReason + '

CONTENT PLAN:
' + $json.contentPlan + '

TOPIC SOURCE:
' + $json.topicMarkdown + '

STYLE GUIDE:
' + $json.styleGuide }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.anthropicModel, max_tokens: 12000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.writerPrompt + '

BRIEF RESPONSE:
' + JSON.stringify($json) + '

TOPIC SOURCE:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.topicMarkdown + '

STYLE GUIDE:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.styleGuide }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.openaiModel, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.editorPrompt + '

Return JSON only.

DRAFT V1:
' + JSON.stringify($json) + '

STYLE GUIDE:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.styleGuide + '

FRAMER CONTRACT:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.framerContract }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.anthropicModel, max_tokens: 12000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.writerPrompt + '

Revise the article. Keep the same required output format.

DRAFT V1:
' + JSON.stringify($('Anthropic Writer Draft v1').first().json) + '

EDITOR REVIEW V1:
' + JSON.stringify($json) }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.openaiModel, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.editorPrompt + '

Return JSON only.

DRAFT V2:
' + JSON.stringify($json) + '

FRAMER CONTRACT:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.framerContract }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.anthropicModel, max_tokens: 12000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.writerPrompt + '

Final revision round. Keep the same required output format.

DRAFT V2:
' + JSON.stringify($('Anthropic Writer Draft v2').first().json) + '

EDITOR REVIEW V2:
' + JSON.stringify($json) }] } }}

={{ { model: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.openaiModel, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Select Next Topic').first().json.editorPrompt + '

Return JSON only. This is the final allowed review round.

DRAFT V3:
' + JSON.stringify($json) + '

FRAMER CONTRACT:
' + $('Select Next Topic').first().json.framerContract }] } }}

nodes.name: Create or Update Framer CMS Draft

parameters.subject: ={{'Proofread-ready editorial draft: ' + $('Store Artifacts and Push').first().json.slug}}
parameters.text:
={{'Article: ' + $('Store Artifacts and Push').first().json.slug + '
Reason: ' + $('Store Artifacts and Push').first().json.selectedTopicReason + '
Editor approved: ' + $('Store Artifacts and Push').first().json.approved + '
Artifacts: ' + $('Store Artifacts and Push').first().json.artifactUrl + '
Framer status: Draft

Publish manually only after personal read.'}}

main.node: Create or Update Framer CMS Draft
